original_title: ZOZO-006 Shame! New Student Mixed Growth and Health Examination 2020 / Physical Measurement-Vaccination
overview: Gender mixed growth health examination 2020 Midsummer. Body measurement-vaccination edition. The flowers in the pussy, the princess, and the boobs are all touched and measured! Capi Capi's little girls who decided to go to the gymnasium in the mountains for a medical examination. "The one chosen for this is special. You can go to the university of your choice by recommendation because your internal score will improve." When I was told that, I was a little worried, "What are you going to do?" "Is it painful?" "Is it fun?" "Isn't it possible to get an injection?" However, when I was flirting on the bus, that feeling flew away somewhere. I came to the gymnasium with such a dream and expectation, but I shook my mouth in front of a full-fledged diagnostic instrument (laughs). That should be it. After all, here you will find equipment (and cocks) for diagnosing health and growth, such as electrocardiogram, breast cancer, lymph, vaginal pressure, and anal! Everyone was stunned, "Well, there are boys ..." "But ... if you didn't come this far ...". Withstand the eyes of a boy in white pants! It's all about getting better at the university and going to the university I admire! A shameful reality health checkup! Six people who quietly endure the gaze of curiosity ... A health examination that is carried out in the dry air ... The shame of a beautiful girl whose body and mind are ridiculed ... "Forgive me ..." "Stop, stop. Teacher ... I'll break if I put my finger in ... "The blushing shame that gradually escalate! The face is flushed, the crotch is honey ..., the smell, taste, and sensitivity are all examined.
title: ZOZO 006
